name: GigaCloud Technology Inc
business: We are a pioneer of global end-to-end B2B ecommerce solutions for large parcel merchandise. Our GigaCloud Marketplace integrates product discovery to payments to logistics, connecting manufacturers in Asia with resellers in the U.S., Europe and Japan.
sellsTo: Resellers in U.S., Europe, and Japan
End customers via third-party ecommerce websites

exposures.sentence: We are a pioneer of global end-to-end B2B ecommerce solutions for large parcel merchandise.
We have built a cross-border fulfillment network optimized for large parcel products.
We utilize artificial intelligence, or AI, software that generates seller ratings and credit profiles through volume data.
Our AI-powered warehousing management system solves many practical problems faced by sellers and buyers.

In April 2024, we launched a new service, Branding-as-a-Service or BaaS, which selects and allows sellers in the our GigaCloud Marketplace to sell products under Christopher Knight Home, a leading American furniture brand.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of New Classic Home Furnishings
catalysts.sentence: On January 1, 2026, we completed the acquisition of New Classic Home Furnishings, Inc., a U.S.-based distributor serving the home furnishings market, for approximately $18.0 million.
On August 13, 2025, the Board approved a new share repurchase program which authorized the repurchase of its Class A ordinary share up to $111.0 million, effective August 17, 2025 for three years.
